quotes.text: I think that 'good taste' is much more about the ability to see and understand that simplicity — and to prefer it over cleverness.
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: Your competitors will copy your features. They can't copy your taste. Build something with taste.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The indie hacker's biggest asset isn't their code. It's their taste. Build things with taste.
quotes.author: based
